accomplishment_projects.title: OMC (Out of Home Measurement Council)
accomplishment_projects.description: Kuper Research is responsible for the technical oversight and project management of the Out of Home audience measurement research.  Up until this research, OOH in South Africa has not had access to audience research that other media types have enjoyed for many years.  This new survey called ROAD (Roadside Outdoor Audience Data) now places OOH on the same playing field providing audience metrics that are comparable with other media. The innovative methodology includes the combination of traffic flows, satellite images, and travel patterns to create a comprehensive traffic model, which when combined with the location of all media owner billboard panels, creates an accurate representation of OOH audiences.  These elements are modelled to create OOH ratings demonstrating reach, frequency, GRP’s, impacts, CPM and so on for Out of Home campaigns or single billboards.  Elements such as direction of traffic flow and visibility are taken into account as part of the model.

accomplishment_projects.title: futurefact
accomplishment_projects.description: futurefact is an independent, home-grown South African survey, which has been tracking the major political, socio-economic, lifestyle, brand or status consciousness, communication, media (including social media) and technology forces shaping the country since 1998. By revealing the forces driving South African society futurefact enables businesses and organisations to make the informed shifts in both strategy and focus required to keep in tune with their target sectors with content and messaging that resonates with their mindsets. ENSURING THE SURVEY CONTENT REMAINS RELEVANT, DYNAMIC & DIAGNOSTIC Each year the range of topics covered adapts to the current pulse of the nation, with the relevant issues being identified at a subscribers' workshop as well as being sourced from global and local opinion leaders. We also routinely track certain questions that are relevant to understanding the significant trends and dynamics of the market in our annual surveys.
